the day before stage 20 would begin with Julio chor hoping to keep his Mountain's classification Jersey Felix gal close to mounting a challenge to take it off him the long goodbye for tibo Pino was almost at an end he will be on home roads in the v in east of Spain a final Mountain Stage to get through for yonas vagor who was about to win the Tour to France over seven minutes in the GC meant a big turnaround an unlikely one was required but there was a stage went up for grabs at every place in the top 10 boring maybe the top two we up for grabs as well 133.5 km up up and down all day plenty of climbing with six classified ascents Lamar stain was the destination after a start in bfor the puty Balon a really important climb with a Grand Des to come afterwards onto the C plil and then an interesting finale slightly up and down in the final few kilomet with challenges to fight for the stage win over the top after this stage only the Paris procession would remain the race would begin climbing the Balon delas the first ever classified climb in Tour of France history things have changed since 1905 one part of bik racing remains though Carlos Rodriguez with a horrible crash sep cus crashing with him both needing attention from the doctor's cup both would continue in the race though as the fight for the Breakaway would rage on Julio Chi corne had already taken maximum points on the first climb and he'd be helped up the hill by his teammate Matias scal moza as he tried to secure the competition mathematically tibo Pino though was about to write another incredible story in his career eventually he was part of a break of 10 Riders established properly with 63 km to go but the pelan behind didn't want to let them go under the Claud lashl and then Julio chor could celebrate as long as he stayed on his bike until the Shan ziz the Italian would be the first man from his Nation to win the Tour to France King of the mountains since 1992 into the final 31 km penultimate climb of he'd still be in the top 10 but he would struggle onto the Finish losing time time needed to be taken back by Pacha when he attacked 45 seconds was the difference Vore the only one could follow him split up as well and the strongest riders in the tour to France leaving tiop Pino behind for one last goodbye Simon Yates made a move from further back Carlos Rodriguez struggled to follow Yates moving up to fourth in the GC with this move brother Adam already third sitting on his wheel over the final climb of the tour to France three at the front and the Yates Brothers about to join them gal vagor Pacha and it soon became the famous five 5 km remained as well and Adam Yates decided to set things up for today Pacha into the last kilometer and Yates was looking more like Michael merco a top lead up from the climber who is about to finish third in the tour to France the man looking to finish first yonas Vago tried to jump poacha but the Slovenian was there the Slovenian was back pure passion plenty of Pride and a Pog back performance T Pacha winning his second stage up the tour to France and taking something out of the race after having been denied the yellow Jersey by yonas Vore P would come across with Bill ba who'd been fighting to move up in the GC Warren Bill putting in a good performance and Carlo Rodriguez in the top five of the Tour of France after a solid fight theight for UA Emirates after a disappointing few days tacha back to winning ways all smiles again he would take the stage but overall the me vagor barring incident or accident will be 24 hours away from winning a second successive tour to France the say Triple G ahead of G vingo Yates and brother Adam Bill Pino bil BAU johanneson and Micah in the top 10 another yellow celebration for Denmark the same for Yambo visma and yonas Ving in the lead of the tour to France 24 hours from safety from home from the sh with a nice 7 minute 29 second Gap Adam Yates in third looking good for the podium Simon in fourth Carlos Rodriguez hanging on to that top five SE cus had crashed earlier in the day and dropped out the top 10 and Julio chord celebrated on crossing the line an Italian king of the mountains for the first time since kuchi in 1992 he won that competition from Felix gal with yonas vagor finishing in third place a polka dot party then for leel Trek and a big moment for Torino what a performance Sensational on feeling swashbuckling as always and he will wear the most combative number as he goes to the Shan zil for a final ever toward a France stage the sage 115 km long will
